workflows.name: Initial cull
workflows.primary_command: mt organize <photo-dir> && mt raw-analyze <photo-dir> --ratings ">=3" && mt lr-plan <photo-dir> --ratings ">=3" && mt lr-apply <photo-dir> --ratings ">=3"
workflows.default_behavior: Organize media, group portrait/panorama frames, rate every RAW, build review contact sheets, then write Lightroom rough-edit XMP for >=3-star files unless the user explicitly asks for initial-cull only.
preflight: Confirm the source photo directory exists.
Run mt status <photo-dir> --json to classify the current workflow state.
Run mt doctor <photo-dir> before changing files.
Run mt organize with --dry-run first when inspecting a new import or uncertain tree.
Report that mt organize moves files into raw/ and hif/ buckets before applying it.
Verify that the command is operating on the intended photo directory, not this repository.
must_not: Do not copy HIF files to an archive destination.
Do not import Lightroom exports into Apple Photos.
Do not write local style learning reports.
Do not use Lightroom Export JPGs for culling or contact sheets.
agent_notes: Use HIF files only as visual previews; use RAW evidence for exposure/color decisions.
Preserve camera white balance by default.
Use portrait/<n>/ and panorama/<n>/ numeric groups.

workflows.name: Finalize refined photos
workflows.default_behavior: Use Lightroom exports as the final pick list, copy matching original HIF previews to the explicit destination, and import Lightroom export JPGs into Apple Photos unless --hif-only is passed.
must_not: Do not infer a destination from a single provided path.
Do not use the source directory, a child directory, featured/, ~/Downloads/featured, or a remembered path as the destination.
Do not copy Lightroom export JPGs to the HIF destination.
Do not copy panorama source-frame HIF files from panorama/<n>/hif/.
preflight: Run mt preflight-run finalize <photo-dir> --copy-to <destination-dir> --scene <scene> for the full read-only GO/NO-GO check.
Run mt status <photo-dir> --workflow finalize --copy-to <destination-dir> --json to classify finalize readiness.
Run mt doctor <photo-dir> --workflow finalize --copy-to <destination-dir> before copying HIF files.
Require --copy-to and verify it is outside the source photo directory.
Use raw/Export and portrait/<n>/raw/Export stems as the HIF copy list.
Use --dry-run when validating a batch before copying HIF files or importing into Apple Photos.
Use --photos-dry-run only when intentionally copying HIF files while validating the Photos import list.

workflows.name: Learn refined color style
workflows.primary_command: Update repo style profiles, preset notes, prompts, and memory from manual Lightroom refinements.
workflows.default_behavior: Extract durable scene-specific style lessons from manually refined XMP/export evidence and fold them back into repository knowledge.
must_not: Do not create per-photo-directory learning reports.
agent_notes: This is a maintenance activity, not a third user-facing photo processing workflow.
Inspect existing scene directions with mt styles or mt styles <profile> --json before updating repo knowledge.
